name: have
description: HappyVertical agent workflow fallbacks for Codex. Provides skills for have:ship and have:review-cycle when no higher-priority Context Forge snapshot or local override is installed.

interface.shortDescription: Review and shipping workflows for HappyVertical projects
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-visible fallback skills for have:review-cycle and have:ship. The have-config resolver may replace these with Context Forge snapshots, active profile defaults, or local overrides during install.
defaultPrompt: Use have:review-cycle for repeat reviews and fixes.
Use have:ship to validate, review, PR, and watch CI.
